---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report a maintenance or housekeeping task
title: "Maintenance: [Short description of the task]"
labels: maintenance, needs-triage
assignees:

---

# Maintenance Report

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Maintenance Type
- [ ] Code Refactoring
- [ ] Dependency Update
- [ ] Documentation Update
- [ ] Cleanup (e.g., unused code, files)
- [ ] Other: [specify]

## Impact
Explain the impact of this maintenance task (e.g., improves performance, reduces technical debt).

## Timeline
Proposed timeline for completing this task (e.g., within 1 week, next sprint).

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
